joke: Hey there, little mama. Is your name Google?
punchline: Because you've got everything I've been searching for!
When you fell from heaven... right into my arms?

joke: Excuse me, beautiful. Do you believe in love at first sight?
punchline: Or should I walk by again?

joke: Hey, baby. Is your dad a baker?
punchline: Because you've got a nice set of buns!

joke: Pardon me, gorgeous. I seem to have lost my phone number.
Mama, you must be a parking ticket.
punchline: Because you've got 'fine' written all over you!
Because whenever I look at you, everyone else disappears!

joke: They say Disneyland is the happiest place on Earth.
punchline: But no one's ever been next to you.
